meta.name: so101_kitchen_v3
meta.provenance: AuraOne-authored repository synthetic fixture generated from three seed scenes; no real robot media, partner data, or third-party demonstrations.
meta.sample_dataset_notice: Synthetic metadata and deterministic data visualizations for Robotics Studio Open source-build review and regression tests.
